j=function(j,H,C,F,a)return o(r,{j,H,C;F;a},y,A)end return j end,{}return(h(-172867-(-958111),{}))(A(a))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(979989-929099)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
